sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68699" key="mono/fqoggos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονό-φθογγος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n68699.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">monophthong, single vowel</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δίφθογγος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2020.tlg001:p.68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theodos.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.68</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
